utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check each for full specification with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance, each with plan name, cost, and brief coverage description—meets requirement with costs. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with plan name, cost, and coverage details—meets requirement with costs. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with plan name, cost, and coverage description—meets requirement with costs. 4) additional_services: includes two enhancement services, each with name and cost—meets requirement with costs. 5) total_budget: includes monthly total, increase from current, annual cost, and timeline—meets requirement for complete cost breakdown. All items are fully specified according to what should be covered with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest item name in the ground-truth ratings. Mental health -> 'InsurePlus Standard Mental Health Plan' corresponds to primary_health_coverage.mental_health 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 7). Home contents -> 'InsurePlus Standard Home Content Insurance' corresponds to property_protection.home_content 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 10).
